mnemonics: PRINT (Pricing, Regret, Implementation, Nash, Truthfulness) - The main pillars of the re-print edition's focus.
keyPoints: The re-print edition likely covers fundamental topics like the Price of Anarchy/Stability.
It explores learning in games, such as regret minimization and its connection to equilibrium convergence.
It includes mechanism design principles, focusing on truthful implementations and revenue equivalence.
commonMistakes: Confusing the Price of Anarchy (worst-case efficiency loss) with the Price of Stability (best-case efficiency of an equilibrium).
Assuming all no-regret learning algorithms converge to a Nash Equilibrium in every game type; this is not true for all games.
